hero.lede: Vicky Israel designs interiors through fabric, light, and thread. Personal consultation, custom drapery, and textiles made to last a generation.

about.headline: Meet Vicky
about.body_1: Twenty years of interior design, textile, and fabric. Every project starts as a conversation — about light, about touch, about how the home should feel at first light.
about.body_2: I work directly with each client, from choosing the fabric to the final hang. Every curtain is sewn to measure, and every home tells its own story.
about.image_alt: Vicky Israel selecting fabric at a textile showroom
about.tile_styling_alt: Linen sheers framing a stone bench

veelo.lede: Photograph your window, choose a fabric, and preview a photo-real rendering of the curtain — before you order.

contact.headline: Let's start the conversation
contact.lede: Every home starts with a conversation. Send an email or a WhatsApp message and we'll set up an introduction.
